message:
🌱 Add cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s-: Support compatibility with AWS CDK v2 / upgrade to mission (#1172)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s-773-support-compatibility-with-aws-cdk-v2-upgrade-to-co",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s-: Support compatibility with AWS CDK v2 / upgrade to constructs v10",
+    "description": "Support compatibility with AWS CDK v2 / upgrade to constructs v10. This issue affects 5+ users.",
+    "type": "upgrade",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- upgrade symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s-\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- -n cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s-\nkubectl get configmap -n cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s-\n```\n[More info](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/cdk/latest/guide/work-with-cdk-v2.html)\n\nI was considering migrating to AWS CDK v2, however it looks like when attempting to install cdk8s in the same virtualenv that it can't solve an appropriate version of"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support compatibility with AWS CDK v2 / upgrade to…",
+        "description": "This should now be resolved. Latest version of cdk8s+ only support constructs 10, and for the cdk8s core library, use cdk8s v1 for working with constructs v3 (e.g v1 of AWS CDK), and use cdk8s v2 for working with constructs v10 (e.g AWS CDK v2)\n```yaml\n# requirements.txt\n\naws-cdk-lib>=2.0.0rc1\nconstructs>=10.0.0\ncdk8s\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s-:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s-/cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- --namespace cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s-\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s-\nhelm list -n cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s-\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Support compatibility with AWS CDK v2 / upgrade… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- -n cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This should now be resolved. Latest version of cdk8s+ only support constructs 10, and for the cdk8s core library, use cdk8s v1 for working with constructs v3 (e.g v1 of AWS CDK), and use cdk8s v2 for working with constructs v10 (e.g AWS CDK v2)",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "# requirements.txt\n\naws-cdk-lib>=2.0.0rc1\nconstructs>=10.0.0\ncdk8s",
+        "ERROR: Cannot install -r requirements.txt (line 1), -r requirements.txt (line 3), -r requirements.txt (line 4), cdk8s, cdk8s-plus-22==1.0.0b157 and constructs because these package versions have conflicting dependencies.\n\nThe conflict is caused by:\n    The user requested constructs\n    aws-cdk-lib 2.17.0 depends on constructs<11.0.0 and >=10.0.0\n    cdk8s 2.2.48 depends on constructs<11.0.0 and >=10.0.0\n    cdk8s-plus-22 1.0.0b157 depends on constructs<4.0.0 and >=3.3.249"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s-",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "upgrade"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s-"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "upgrade"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/cdk8s-team/cdk8s/issues/773",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/cdk8s-team/cdk8s"
+    },
+    "reactions": 5,
+    "comments": 13,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-15T06:35:47.705Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",

+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
